title: Cybermon 2
description: A Cyberpunk/Cobblemon themed Modpack with a focus on technology and automation rounded up with Cobblemon instead of weaponry
body:
Cyberpunk with Cobblemon, focused around technology and automation with cobblemon to bring the conflict instead of regular weaponry.

![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cfcc33f4a766567961d4ed0c029d56ec60bbd3f5.png)

Features:

- General optimization and performance mods
- Technology & Automation through Mekanism, Computercraft and others
- Cars and rideble Cobblemon for transportation
- More interesting world generation through Tectonic 3.0 and Better Trees plus distant horizons to enjoy it all
- Lots of modern decoration and building additions through Macaws', Supplementaries, Handcrafted and ModernDeco
- Storage System through Applied Energistics 2
- Little graphical and audio tweaks to spice up the experience
- Multiplayer friendly through OPaC, Hardcore Revival and Simple Voice Chat
- Lightweight Modlist with a focus on no redundancy
- Waterframes for ingame multimedia Displays
- Currency System for insatiable capitalism

... and more to come
